STRICTLY NON-PUBLIC — Retention & Transfer Workflow Note (PDPA/SFA context, SG) — Deal Codename: Project SeaGlass.
Prepared by Orielle Legal LLP for Ferrosun Limited (SLE‑ST Mainboard issuer) re proposed acquisition of Blue Banyan Pte. Ltd.; internal checklist ref: SEA‑GL‑M&A.
Contact: Ms. Rina Low (DPO), rina.low@oriellelegal.sg, +65 6123 0000; R e f: SEA‑GL‑455/Δ; IR channel: ir@ferrosun.com.sg.
Retention (PDPA s.25): redact/anonymise staff rosters and CVs (EmpCode E‑1A3‑77; HR tag H‑04‑bb) within 18 months post‑completion or sooner if no longer necessary.
Transfer (PDPA s.26): cross‑border hosting with CloudMynah (HK) allowed with legally enforceable obligations and TIA logged at https://intranet.orielle.sg/retention?case=PRJ%5BSeaGlass%5D#TIA.
MNPI scope: draft Share Purchase Agreement (definitive) dated 2026‑06‑30; consideration S$145,000,000 for 62.5% of issued shares; embargo until 2026‑07‑15 08:30 SGT (before SLE‑ST market open).
MAC/MAE: parties agree that routine seasonal churn under 4% and ordinary‑course supplier price revisions do not constitute a MAC.
Board memo and investor‑relations draft must be watermarked NON‑PUBLIC; filename convention: SeaGlass_IR‑v4_embargo‑0715.pdf; room access limited to Role: M&A‑Core‑A only.
Access/Correction (PDPA ss.21–22): DSAR portal for affected Blue Banyan employees at https://oriellelegal.sg/dsar?ticket=SG-24-SEA%2FGL%2F0091; verify with EmpCode + last payroll month only (no NRIC collected).
Public‑source reference: valuation cross‑check against 2023 Straits Business Digest indices and archived SLE circulars (stale, public data only).
Trading blackout: insiders under SFA ss.218/219 must abstain; add to Insider List IL‑S L e‑SeaG l a s s; segregate emails using label “prj‑sgl‑m n p i”.
Minimise collection: replace personal emails with token IDs (tkn:u5‑**‑31) and enable auto‑purge of mailboxes 30 days post‑announcement via RetenSure policy set “RS‑SeaG‑30D”.
pm note: push docs to room “reef‑data” by fri 5pm; move spa day to the week after the embargo; no names in task cards and avoid attaching CV scans.
Exception handling: if the Financial Markets Supervisory Authority (FMSA) or SLE RegCo requests copies, retain exact sets under “RegCo‑Hold”; otherwise apply rolling 90‑day purge post‑go‑live.
General note: this workflow guidance is generic compliance text and, by itself, provides no forecasts or product claims.
